summary: Iteration 36: Cloudinary integration testing complete. All backend endpoints working correctly - image/video upload to Cloudinary, 302 redirects with CDN URLs, Cloudinary transformations (w_N,q_N,f_auto,c_limit). Frontend correctly uses Cloudinary URLs with native transformations via optimizedImg function.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: Cloudinary config properly initialized from env vars (lines 27-34)
server.py: upload_image correctly uploads to Cloudinary first, falls back to Object Storage (lines 2212-2277)
server.py: get_uploaded_image correctly redirects to Cloudinary with transformations (lines 2279-2307)
server.py: upload_video correctly uploads to Cloudinary (lines 2355-2403)
server.py: get_video correctly redirects to Cloudinary (lines 2405-2413)
server.py: migrate-to-cloudinary endpoint works for admin (lines 3332-3383)
utils.js: resolveMediaUrl passes Cloudinary URLs unchanged (lines 10-14)
utils.js: optimizedImg uses native Cloudinary transformations for CDN URLs (lines 17-30)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (/sauny and /balie pages load correctly with Cloudinary images/videos)

seed_data_creation: Created test image via POST /api/admin/upload during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cloudinary integration is fully working. 106/106 images and 43/46 videos have cloudinary_url in database. New uploads go to Cloudinary first. GET /api/images/{id} and /api/videos/{id}.mp4 redirect to Cloudinary CDN with 302. Frontend optimizedImg function uses native Cloudinary transformations (w_N,q_N,f_auto,c_limit). Cache-Control headers are set by backend but overwritten by CDN/proxy (infrastructure behavior, not code issue).

backend_image_upload_cloudinary.details: POST /api/admin/upload uploads image to Cloudinary and returns CDN URL

backend_image_redirect_cloudinary.details: GET /api/images/{id} with cloudinary_url returns 302 redirect to Cloudinary CDN

backend_video_redirect_cloudinary.details: GET /api/videos/{id}.mp4 with cloudinary_url returns 302 redirect to Cloudinary CDN

backend_migration_endpoint.details: POST /api/admin/migrate-to-cloudinary works (admin only), returns migration stats

frontend_resolveMediaUrl.details: resolveMediaUrl passes Cloudinary URLs unchanged (verified in utils.js code)

frontend_optimizedImg_cloudinary.details: optimizedImg uses native Cloudinary transformations (w_N,q_N,f_auto,c_limit) - verified on /balie page with 24 images

frontend_sauny_page.details: /sauny loads without errors, 17 Cloudinary images with transformations

frontend_balie_page.details: /balie loads without errors, 24 Cloudinary images + 1 Cloudinary video
